'''Polana''' was the third [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Aramand system/Legends|Aramand system]]. It was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]]. Its nine [[Moon/Legends|moons]] supported [[Aramandi]] colonies.

{{Planet-stub}}
